name: @hippo/sdk
description: Hippo thin-client SDK — two-stage loader, closed Shadow DOM, server-driven card renderer

scripts.build: vite build --config vite.loader.config.ts && vite build --config vite.panel.config.ts && node scripts/size-gate.mjs
scripts.dev: vite build --config vite.loader.config.ts && vite build --watch --config vite.panel.config.ts
